sidebar_relay_empty: No active relays found. Create one here.
logs_no_gateway_desc: No intercepted communication from tools yet. Click 'Simulate Payload' to run a local test.
logs_ref_only: For reference only, refer to the actual billing
select_local_relay: Select or create a workspace relay in the sidebar
workspace_relay_created: Workspace relay created with default API key
system_cache_cleared: Response cache disabled and persisted to system settings.
system_cache_hint: Clearing disables both cache modes in persisted system settings.
no_workspace_relays: No workspace relays configured. Create one in the Workspace view.
providers_desc: Drag to reorder, search to locate, and import real-time config.
copy_openai: OpenAI base URL copied to clipboard!
copy_anthropic: Anthropic base URL copied to clipboard!
copy_gemini: Gemini base URL copied to clipboard!
modal_endpoints_desc: Override default API endpoints for specific model providers. Useful for proxy servers.
ctrl_speed_check_desc: Automatically measure API and show latency in the list.
ctrl_health_check_desc: Periodically send heartbeat to verify endpoint connectivity.
ctrl_system_proxy_desc: Traffic will go through the global HTTP/HTTPS proxy.
chart_hour_desc: Stats gathered every 2 hours, locally interpolated with high fidelity
chart_day_desc: Visualizing active requests per day to capture cyclical throughput patterns
chart_week_desc: Aggregated by week to support long-term operations planning
chart_month_desc: Segmented by natural calendar months to track structural changes
client_keys_desc: Configure independent API keys for this local transit route. Clients can connect to this gateway using designated keys.
deeplink_detected: 📥 Detected inbound ecosystem Deep Link, smart configuration loaded!
strategy_apply_failed: Failed to apply strategy, please check key validity.
key_already_imported: API Key already imported, skipped duplicate.
key_sync_success: 🎉 API Key smoothly synchronized to local keystore!
sync_failed: Sync failed, please refresh and retry
api_keys_desc: Manage API keys for local proxy tunneling with strong client-side encryption. Supports all tool APIs.
search_key_placeholder: Search key name or API endpoint...
add_first_key: Click to add your first key
advanced_routing_desc: Configure advanced multi-account routing and anti-abuse policies to optimize API throughput and bypass rate-limiting (429).
mode_round_robin_desc: Distribute requests sequentially across all active provider accounts.
mode_least_latency_desc: Route to the provider account with the lowest historical response time.
mode_weighted_random_desc: Distribute based on custom weights defined per provider.
mode_fallback_desc: Always use primary account, fallback to others only on failure or rate-limit.
auto_retry_desc: Seamlessly retry failed requests (429, 50x) using the next available provider account in the rotation.
